title: stachys recta subsp. rhodopaea
intro: Stachys recta subsp. rhodopaea, also known as Greek betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys recta plant that is native to Greece. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal medicine, Stachys recta subsp. rhodopaea is often prepared in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support overall well-being.
